codeReview.summary: The episodic memory feature was already fully implemented in event_log.rs. The worker's commit (56b2d9e) only renamed the test module from 'tests' to 'episodic' to enable test discovery via the 'episodic' filter specified in verification steps. The implementation covers all required event types (tool_invocation, decision, observation, error, outcome) with immutable timestamped EventLogEntry storage in append-only JSONL format. No code issues found.

summary: Feature mem-episodic-memory is implemented correctly. The implementation in event_log.rs provides immutable timestamped events (tool_invocation, decision, observation, error, outcome) stored as EventLogEntry in append-only JSONL format. Worker correctly identified the feature was already complete and made a minimal fix (renaming test module) to enable test discovery. All 11 episodic tests pass. Build and clippy pass. No issues found.
